name: hud_ui_element_reset_common_ftable
description: HudUiElement::ResetCommonFTable restores the common HudUiElement function table.
known_limits: Binary-safe verification is deferred to a coherent HUD element class pass.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly/decompilation for 0x4b47a0 validates the single store of g_HudUiCommon_FTable to self->ftable and immediate return.
The native smoke calls ResetCommonFTable directly and validates the restored common table before exercising SetVisible.
